name: lsp-from-spec
description: Prototype LSP server built from the ProvekIt protocol spec alone (no provekit framework dependency). Companion to protocol/specs/2026-04-30-lsp-from-protocol.md.
comment_no_provekit_dep: Intentionally no dependency on the provekit package, no relative imports from ../../src, no kits/* imports. The whole point of this prototype is to demonstrate that the protocol spec is sufficient on its own.
